---
title: "Final Project: State/Region Incarceration Levels by Sex"
author: "Ava, Alex, Luci, and Christine"
date: "6-7-26"
output: html_document
---

# Final Project Proposal

## Table of Contents

* <a href="Introduction.html">Introduction</a>
* <a href="DataSources.html">Data Sources</a> 
* <a href="DataProcessingandMethods.html">Data Processing and Methods</a>
* <a href="Limitations.html">Limitations</a> 
* <a href="Conclusion.html">Conclusion</a> 
* <a href="ContributionsReferencesAppendix.html">Contributions, References, and Appendix</a> 
* <a href="CompleteReport.html">Complete Report</a> 

## Github Links:
* Original Repository: https://github.com/avaelisa/soc10finalproject-alex-christine-ava-luci
* Repository for the Website: https://github.com/avaelisa/Final-Project-SOC10-aacl
